mapper.select: SELECT id, version_code, sites, release_date, status, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM versions ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO versions (version_code, sites, release_date, status, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{versionCode}, #{sites}, #{releaseDate}::DATE, #{status}, #{notes}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE versions SET version_code = #{versionCode}, sites = #{sites}, release_date = #{releaseDate}::DATE, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE versions SET sites = #{sites}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
